controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: APGP0400 (4-burner LP), APGN0400 (4-burner NG), APCG8LP (8-burner LP)
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 Equipment socket (10A max) activates LP/NG generator in Greenhouse/Enrichment mode when PPM falls below Set Target Low; shuts off above Set Target Hi. Built-in photocell suppresses CO2 output at night. Unit is 120V/60Hz US-spec; step-down transformer required for European 230V mains.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Ares 2 (2-burner LP), Ares 4 (4-burner LP), Ares 6 (6-burner LP)
compatible_devices.notes: Any 120V LP or NG CO2 generator compatible via CO2 Equipment socket in Greenhouse mode; specific Titan Controls model compatibility inferred from universal 120V outlet standard. 10A socket limit applies.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor
compatible_devices.notes: Greenhouse mode also supports compressed CO2 tank systems equipped with a 120V solenoid regulator: APC8400 opens/closes solenoid via the CO2 Equipment socket. Any 120V AC solenoid-equipped CO2 regulator from any brand is compatible. 10A max.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor
compatible_devices.notes: In Vent/CO2 Decrease mode, Exhaust Fan socket (10A max) activates exhaust fan when PPM exceeds Set Target Hi; shuts off when PPM drops below Set Target Low. On/off switching only, no variable speed. Any 120V AC inline or exhaust fan up to 10A compatible. Photocell does not affect Vent mode output.
